records.headline: Santa Claus Is Different for the Rich
records.body_preview_landing: First, the residents of Sesame Street relocated to HBO Max ($180 a year). Then, the Disney princesses found an expensive new home on Disney Plus ($69.99 a year). And this holiday season, shoppers are finding that one of the more venerable fantastical characters for children --…

records.headline: Two Deaths and My Life
records.abstract: The memento mori of two friends.
records.body_preview_landing: Samuel Beckett, when asked one beautiful spring morning whether such a day did not make him glad to be alive, responded, "I wouldn't go as far as that." Life is a predicament, death the elephant at the horizon that looms larger as the years pass. Still, life is what we have. To…

records.headline: What to Cook This Week
records.abstract: A Mother's Day cheat sheet, and recipes for the week ahead.
